name: Dream of a Nightmarish Runaway
detailed_description:
You wake up in an absolute darkness. You don't know who you are or how did you get there.

But one thing is certain, the whole world will make you very painfully aware that you should not be there.

This is a visual novel game in which you will have to make many difficult decisions that will end your story prematurely, lead you to many tragic endings, or allow you to escape with your life.

Can you manage to escape everything that lurks on you in this nightmarish place?

Just remember that not every obvious solution, is the best one....

Anyway, you'll soon find out yourself....

GAME FEATURES:

  • dark and overwhelming graphics, strengthening the sense of danger and alienation

  • creepy soundtrack

  • unpredictable consequences of the decisions taken

  • good(?) endings amidst a mass of nightmarish ones

  • 10 endings (one hidden)

Even though you have achieved (or have lost?) everything, It is still not the end of your nightmarish journey. When you understand what mess you are into, it will be time for another story...
